calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-11-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:25am
Judge Pro Tem David Porter, clerk J. Kong, D525, not reported.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Parties previously sworn, respectively present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Porter.

Appellant: Erdal Tekin appears as proper with Turkish interpreter Osman Dogru.
Respondent: Yilmaz Ogur appears as proper.

EXHR VARIOUS UBER DOCUMENTS
EXHA PRINT OUT LIST OF WITHDREWLS PAYMENET FROM ATM MACHINE

ALL EXHIBITS RETURNED TO THE PARTIES.

9:45am
Matter is submitted. No evidence retained.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Apr-21-2014 Judgment Entered

DEFENDANT'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Apr-21-2014 Judgment Entered
